# getascraper/how-to-scrape-hn-hiring

> how-to-scrape-hn-hiring is an Apify actor that extracts structured data from Hacker News Who is Hiring.
> Built with TypeScript. Free tier available.

## Overview
- Hacker News Who is Hiring scraper and data extraction API
- Extracts: company, job_title, location, remote, technologies, description, url
- Output formats: JSON, CSV, Excel
- Free tier: 10,000 results/month

## Key Pages
- README: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-hn-hiring/blob/main/README.md
- Apify Store: https://apify.com/getascraper/hn-hiring-scraper

## API Usage
- Node.js SDK: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-hn-hiring/blob/main/README.md
- REST API: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-hn-hiring/blob/main/README.md

## Pricing
- Free tier: 10,000 results/month
- Starter: Contact for pricing
- Business: Contact for pricing

## Support
- GitHub Issues: https://github.com/getascraper/how-to-scrape-hn-hiring/issues
- Apify Discord: https://discord.gg/apify
